imaging_request.indication_text: Indeterminate findings on routine surveillance CT — increasing 1.2cm pleural-based opacity in contralateral lung 14 months post-resection. Differential includes second primary vs metastasis vs benign inflammatory process. Considering PET/CT in conjunction.

clinical_indication.diagnosis_text: Malignant neoplasm of upper lobe, right bronchus
clinical_indication.supporting_notes: Pathologic staging pT2aN0M0, Stage IB right upper lobe NSCLC. Lobectomy 2025-03-10. No adjuvant indicated for Stage IB. Routine surveillance CT 2026-03-25 showed new contralateral left upper lobe 0.8cm opacity. Repeat CT 2 months later shows interval growth to 1.2cm. PET/CT now being considered to characterize. Submission asks: is this within routine surveillance scope or is this diagnostic workup of new finding?
